title: NameGradient
description: It offers customizable gradients via intuitive GUI menus, commands like /namegradient to open editors, and support for requirements such as permissions or group assignments for specific styles. Players can preview and set gradients with start/end colors
body:
It offers customizable gradients via intuitive GUI menus, commands like /namegradient to open editors, and support for requirements such as permissions or group assignments for specific styles. Players can preview and set gradients with start/end colors, styles, and even blacklists for names, enhancing server aesthetics without performance issues.
